officer_honest_report.from_belief: reports reflect officer's belief state (majority of seeds)
M7.7 §4: patron audit depends on belief-mediated reports. Reported values within 40% of believed — from belief, not fabricated. Distribution of honesty is the finding.
officer_honest_report.trust_shading_coup: low trust produces shading; high trust reports accurately (majority of seeds)
M7.7: low-trust officers shade bad news (under-report dead_frac). Shading applied iff trust<0.8. Seed of the lying-chronicle machinery.
